name: Triple Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the biscuit mix, sugar, and cocoa. Stir in 1/2 cup milk, butter, 1/4 cup whipped topping or ice cream, and vanilla until blended.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup chocolate chips; spread evenly in prepared pan.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/4 cup milk, remaining 1/2 cup whipped topping or ice cream, and hot water.
6. Pour the liquid mixture carefully over the top of the mixture in the pan. Do not stir.
7. Sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup chocolate chips over the surface.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the center is set and the cake begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
9. Allow the cake to stand for 15 minutes before serving. Spoon into dessert dishes, transferring the pudding from the bottom of the pan on top.
10. Serve warm. Garnish with whipped topping if desired. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
